postgres_count_sql:
SELECT 'workspaces' AS table_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS count
FROM workspaces
WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'projects' AS table_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS count
FROM projects
WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY table_name;
d1_count_sql:
SELECT 'workspaces' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM workspaces
WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'projects' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM projects
WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY table_name;
d1_relationship_sql:
SELECT
  'projects.workspace_id' AS name,
  'projects' AS source,
  'workspaces' AS target,
  COUNT(*) AS orphan_count
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN workspaces w
  ON w.id = p.workspace_id
  AND w.deleted_at IS NULL
WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND w.id IS NULL
ORDER BY name;
